items.title: The Hidden Cost of Cheap Hosting
items.meta: 1,450 words · draft v2 · target: SMB owners
items.body: Opens with a downtime horror story, then a clean TCO breakdown. Strong hook, but the middle sags where it lists provider specs.

items.title: How We Cut Our Build Times in Half
items.meta: 980 words · draft v1 · target: engineering leads
items.body: Concrete before/after numbers and a clear method. Reads a little dry — could use one narrative thread to carry it.

items.title: Stop Writing Meeting Notes by Hand
items.meta: 1,200 words · draft v3 · target: ops managers
items.body: Practical and well structured. The call to action is buried in the last paragraph and easy to miss.

items.title: A Field Guide to Boring Technology
items.body: Opinionated and fun, but long. Needs a trim and a sharper thesis up top.

items.title: Your Roadmap Is a Guess. Say So.
items.meta: 760 words · draft v2 · target: product managers
items.body: Punchy and short. Might be too thin — could use one worked example to land the argument.
